query:
SELECT u.name, u.email, c.title as course
FROM course_enrollments ce
JOIN users u ON ce.userId = u.id
JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT u.name, u.email, c.title as course
FROM course_enrollments ce
JOIN users u ON ce.userId = u.id
JOIN courses c ON ce.courseId = c.id
WHERE u.email = 'student@test.com'
